Achievements.Name: Overkill
Achievements.Description: Defeat a Zombie with a roll of 7 or greater.

Achievements.Name: Don't be a Hero
Achievements.Description: Win a game by reaching the Helipad.

Achievements.Name: Hail to the King, Baby
Achievements.Description: Kill a Zombie with Chainsaw & Shotgun cards in play at the same time.

Achievements.Name: Omega Man
Achievements.Description: Kill all Zombies in a Survival Horror game.

Achievements.Name: Zombie Hunter
Achievements.Description: Win a game by killing 25 Zombies.

Achievements.Name: Was it worth it?
Achievements.Description: Use 2 or more Hearts in a single combat, then win by using Bullets.

Achievements.Name: Zombie, Interrupted
Achievements.Description: Kill a Zombie by playing Grenade when 'Alternate Food Source' is in play.

Achievements.Name: Master of Arms
Achievements.Description: Play every weapon card at least once.

Achievements.Name: Blunt Force Trauma
Achievements.Description: Kill 3 zombies while 'No Guts, No Glory' is in effect.

Achievements.Name: Night Drive
Achievements.Description: Play 'The Keys Are Still in It!' while 'Too... tired... to... run' is in play.

Achievements.Name: Fresh Meat
Achievements.Description: Kill 50 zombies with the Meat Cleaver.

Achievements.Name: It's Me! Let me in!
Achievements.Description: Use 'There You Are!' to move your pawn from an outdoor square into any building.

Achievements.Name: Shop Smart
Achievements.Description: Use 'Hey, I Got One of Those' to gain a Shotgun.
